steps.title: Interpret the variable x
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents the number of months after the end of November 2012. To find the number of projects at the end of November 2012 itself, we need the value at $x = 0$ (zero months have passed after that starting date).

steps.title: Read the graph at x = 0
steps.content: From the graph, at $x = 0$ (the $y$-intercept), the curve passes through the point $(0, 5)$. The predicted number of active projects at the end of November 2012 was $5$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
